text: I have been visiting this place for many years now and have always had a good experience with the staff as well as the fuel quality. They also have a PUC centre in the same vicinity, which is my go-to place too. Overall, it gives complete peace of mind.....

text: It provides numerous facilities and accepts payments via multiple mediums. The structural design of this place allows users to form a queue without disturbing the traffic on the road. The service is very quick and and staff tries to give their best in their work.

station_address: Survey No 9, CTS 1, opposite Mata Sitala, Saraswati Baug, D Vadavali, Andheri East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400093
text:
Good place for a quick fuel stop. The staff here is polite and helpful — both male and female attendants are present, which is great to see.
They also accept credit cards, making the payment process smooth and convenient.
Plus, they provide air for tyres, including nitrogen — a useful service for every traveller.

Clean and efficient overall. Worth stopping by!

station_address: Survey No 9, CTS 1, opposite Mata Sitala, Saraswati Baug, D Vadavali, Andheri East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400093
text:
They Cheat to Customer,

I have posted a pic before refuelling and after refuelling and with the computerised bill as well.

I have made a purchase for 1liter and i have reserve for 0.5 liter and as u can see before and after refuelling how they cheated me and when i asked them they said its automatic and my activa 3g has problem but i told them its brand new vehicle they said they can do any thing.

Seriously they are openly cheating customer.

station_address: Survey No 9, CTS 1, opposite Mata Sitala, Saraswati Baug, D Vadavali, Andheri East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400093
text: Absolutely poor service. People are not interested in doing work...when you enter the space, they just keep pushing you to other filling stations despite most of them being vacant. When you move to the other, they divert you to the third, in the meantime two other cars have come after you and have been accommodated. No one speaks Marathi, and the general mood if staff is they don't care about customer service. What a pity, and as paying customers we have to put up with this, since the other other petrol pump on this road is always overfull and wait times in the morning there easily go upto 20 mins.
